title: Add sales_service unit tests
description: Create tests/unit/test_sales_service.py with unit tests for SalesService. Add test_create_opportunity_returns_api_response (calls create_opportunity, asserts result.success is True and result.data['id'] is not None), test_get_opportunity_found, test_get_opportunity_not_found, test_update_opportunity, test_delete_opportunity, test_list_opportunities_pagination. Import SalesService from src.services.sales_service.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_sales_service.py --collect-only shows >=5 test items; pytest tests/unit/test_sales_service.py -v passes all; assert result.data['id'] is not None for create.
obsolete_reason: deferred while DB migration is in flight; will revisit after Task 1+
